title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
| Tender for hiring Maruti ECO Vehicle (CNG), including fuel and driver of the hired vehicle, for use in the office of the Chief Executive Officer, Society for Management of the Sonar Tari State Guest House and Other Government Establishments, Government of Tripura for protocol duties. | 20/12/2023 | 27/12/2023 | |
| Tender for hiring of Maruti ECO Vehicle (CNG) including fuel and driver of the hired vehicle for use in the office of the Chief Executive officer, Society for Management of the Sonar Tari State Guest House & Other Government Establishments, Government of Tripura for protocol duties. | | 21/12/2023 | 27/12/2023 | |
| Tender for settlement of six (6) numbers of non-functioning country liquor shops under West Tripura District | | 24/11/2023 | 18/12/2023 | |
| Tender for settlement of two (2) numbers of new foreign liquor shops, i.e., Panchabati FL Shop and Chechuria FL Shop, under West Tripura District | | 24/11/2023 | 18/12/2023 | |
